subject: Re: I need your approval
body:

body_html:
THANK YOU, Jeffrey!
 


 
On Nov 9, 2007 7:32 AM, J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com> wrote:
you always have my approval


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com >
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, November 8, 2007 10:36:13 AM
Subject: I need your approval

Dear JE,
I was headhunted for a position in Dubai at Island Global Yachting. I don't know if they're interested in me, but of course I need your approval if they would be.
 
Current company is fading. Shady investors, insurance fraud, and I'm just waiting for my boss to get a Ukrainian bullet through his head.
 
Thinking of you, always wishing you well,

--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062




--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
